PLEASE VISIT THE FOUNDATION'S WEBSITE AT WWW.BANKOFAMERICA.COM/FOUNDATION FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION RELATING TO THESE AND OTHER PROGRAMS.

contact.how_to_apply: Grant applications are submitted through a third-party application called CyberGrants. These applications must include: 1. A short, one-page cover letter signed by an authorized agent. 2. A proposal narrative with the following information: - Legal name of the organization, employer identification number (EIN), address (no post office boxes), telephone number, and name, title and e-mail address of contact person. - Location of organization - Amount of request and name of program. - History of the organization and its mission. - Description of target population including the number of students served. - Description of the program, how it aligns with the focus areas of the Foundation. - Timeline for implementation. 3. Current organization and program budgets.

comparable_grant.purpose: GENERAL SUPPORT FOR PROTECTING, PREPARING, AND POSITIONING HOMELESS TEENS FOR THEIR FUTURE.

contact.restrictions: CRITERIA MAY INCLUDE, BUT NEED NOT BE LIMITED TO: PRIOR ACADEMIC PERFORMANCE, PERFORMANCE ON TESTS DESIGNED TO MEASURE ABILITY AND APTITUDE FOR RELATED FIELDS, RECOMMENDATION FROM INSTRUCTIORS, AND FINANCIAL NEED. OTHER THAN THE CRITERIA LISTED, THERE ARE NO RESTRICTIONS ON THE SCHOLARSHIPS. ALL FUNDS GIVEN TO ORGANIZATIONS OR SCHOOLS MUST BE USED TO PROMOTE EDUCATION, SUPPORT STUDENTS AND/OR ESTABLISH NEW STUDY PROGRAMS.
contact.how_to_apply: ALL SCHOLARSHIP APPLICANTS SHOULD SUBMIT A SCHOLARSHIP APPLICATION THAT INCLUDES: A BIOGRAPHICAL RECORD AND SUPPORTING MATERIAL SUCH AS ESSAYS, LETTERS OF RECOMMENDATION, GRADE TRANSCRIPTS, AND SPECIAL AWARDS. ADDITIONALLY, ORGANIZATIONS, SCHOOLS, COLLEGES OR UNIVERSITIES CAN REQUEST TO RECEIVE FUNDS AT THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS' DISCRETION.

contact.deadlines: THERE ARE CURRENTLY NO SUBMISSION DEADLINES.
contact.restrictions: THE TRUST DOCUMENT SPECIFIES THAT THE TRUST ASSETS BE USED TO MAKE CHARITABLE DISTRIBUTIONS ONLY TO ENTITIES THAT QUALIFY AS A "QUALIFIED CHARITABLE RECIPIENT" MEANING AN ENTITY THAT IS DESCRIBED IN CODE SECTION 170(C), 2055(A) AND 2522(A). IN THE CASE OF ANY DISTRIBUTION TO A CHARITABLE RECEIPIENT DESCRIBED IN CODE SECTION 170(C)(1), THE DISTRIBUTION SHALL BE MADE FOR EXCLUSIVELY PUBLIC PURPOSES. THE TRUST DOCUMENT SPECIFIES THAT THE TRUST ASSETS BE USED PRIMARILY FOR CHRISTIAN EVANGELISM, CHRISTIAN MISSIONS, CHRISTIAN DISCIPLESHIP, AND THE TEACHING OF THE GOSPEL OF JESUS CHRIST, INCLUDING TO ORGANIZATIONS THAT SERVE AS WITNESS TO THE TEACHINGS OF JESUS CHRIST, WITH THE GOAL BEING TO PRIMARILY BENEFIT CHRISTIAN CHILDREN'S HOMES.
contact.how_to_apply: THERE IS CURRENTLY NO SET FORMAT FOR APPLICATIONS. REQUESTS SHOULD INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING (1) MOST RECENT FORM 990, (2) MOST RECENT COPY OF AUDITED OR REVIEWED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS, (3) INFORMATION REGARDING THE ACTIVITIES OF THE CHARITY, AND (4) DESCRIPTION OF FUNDING BEING REQUESTED.
